rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §254.093, which governs semiannual campaign finance reporting by officeholders.
quote: Sec. 254.093. SEMIANNUAL REPORTING SCHEDULE FOR OFFICEHOLDER. (a) An officeholder shall file two reports for each year as provided by this section.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses election reporting, not property tax exemptions.
